queries.name: official_mcp_launches
queries.query: ("MCP" OR "mcp server" OR "Model Context Protocol") (launch OR launched OR shipping OR shipped OR released OR "now live" OR beta OR GA OR "public beta" OR "private beta") (official OR company OR startup OR team OR founder OR product) -filter:replies

queries.name: claude_code_plugin_launches
queries.query: ("Claude Code" OR "Anthropic marketplace" OR "/plugin install" OR "/plugin marketplace") (plugin OR extension) (launch OR launched OR shipped OR released OR "now live" OR beta) -filter:replies

queries.name: cross_host_launches
queries.query: ("MCP" OR plugin) (Claude OR Cursor OR Codex OR ChatGPT OR OpenCode OR Windsurf OR VSCode) (launch OR launched OR shipped OR "now live" OR available) -filter:replies

queries.name: one_host_first_launches
queries.query: ("MCP" OR plugin) (Cursor OR Codex OR "Claude Code" OR Claude Desktop) ("now live" OR launched OR shipped OR released) -filter:replies

queries.name: mcp_distribution_and_growth
queries.query: ("MCP" OR "mcp server") (distribution OR grow OR adoption OR customers OR users OR pricing OR monetize OR monetization OR GTM OR revenue) -filter:replies

queries.name: platform_rollout_and_auth
queries.query: ("MCP" OR plugin OR agent) (auth OR OAuth OR rollout OR governance OR policy OR gateway OR manifest OR install OR packaging OR hooks OR portability) (Claude OR Cursor OR Codex OR enterprise OR platform) -filter:replies

queries.name: npm_github_producthunt_releases
queries.query: ("MCP" OR plugin) (npm OR GitHub OR "Product Hunt") (launch OR launched OR shipped OR released OR "now live") -filter:replies
